text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I've just finished observing a race<n>when...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
That was a most excellent race. It<n>offered plenty
of points to learn from,<n>don't you agree?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
From her positioning and route<n>selection to the
timing of her final<n>push, everything about her
strategy<n>was magnificent.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
If I wanted to win against someone of<n>her caliber,
what approach would be<n>most effective, I
wonder?
choice_data_list:
You could throw them off by messing with their
pace.

Try sticking close to them to make sure they
can't run the way they want.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I see. That would prevent them<n>from
conserving the strength in their<n>legs properly.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hmmm, and if one is able to pull that<n>off...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder and I thoroughly<n>discuss various
strategies to apply<n>pressure on opponents during
races.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I see... Better to bend than to break,<n>as the
saying goes.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Staying close to an opponent from<n>start to finish
will greatly hinder their<n>ability to run... That is quite
an<n>excellent tactic, I must say.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder and I leisurely discuss<n>the
intricacies of how to target a<n>formidable opponent
during a race.
